requirements.statement: The system shall display a catalog of handmade ceramic products with name, description, price, images, category, and stock availability.

criteria.must: A product listing shows the product's name
A product listing shows the product's price
A product detail page shows the product's description
A product detail page shows at least one product image
A product listing/detail shows the product's category
A product listing/detail shows the product's stock availability

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to browse products by category.

criteria.must: Selecting a category filters the catalog to only that category's products

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to search products by keyword.

criteria.must: Searching by a keyword returns only products whose name or description matches

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to view a detailed product page with additional images and related/similar products.

criteria.must: The product detail page displays all product information (name, description, price, category, stock)
The product detail page displays additional images beyond the primary listing image
The product detail page displays related/similar products

requirements.statement: The system shall indicate when a product is out of stock and prevent it from being added to the cart in that case.

criteria.must: An out-of-stock product is visibly marked as out of stock
Attempting to add an out-of-stock product to the cart is prevented

requirements.statement: The system shall allow sorting and/or filtering of catalog listings.

criteria.must: Applying a sort option (e.g. price, newest) changes the order of the catalog listing

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to add a product with a chosen quantity to their shopping cart.

criteria.must: Adding a product with a chosen quantity places that product and quantity into the cart

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to view the contents of their cart, including product details, quantity, unit price, and line/total price.

criteria.must: The cart view shows each item's product details, quantity, unit price, and line total
The cart view shows the overall cart total

requirements.statement: The system shall allow shoppers to update the quantity of an item in the cart or remove an item from the cart.

criteria.must: Updating an item's quantity in the cart reflects the new quantity and recalculated line total
Removing an item from the cart removes it from the displayed cart contents

requirements.statement: The system shall recalculate the cart subtotal, applicable taxes, shipping estimate, and total whenever the cart contents change.

criteria.must: Changing cart contents recalculates the subtotal, tax, shipping estimate, and total shown to the shopper

requirements.statement: The system shall persist the cart for a guest shopper for the duration of their browser session at minimum.

criteria.must: A guest's cart contents remain available after navigating to another page within the same browser session

requirements.statement: The system shall persist the cart for a registered customer across sessions and devices.

criteria.must: A signed-in customer's cart contents are still present after signing out and signing back in

requirements.statement: The system shall prevent adding more of a product to the cart than is currently available in stock.

criteria.must: Attempting to add a quantity greater than the available stock is rejected or capped at the available stock

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a shopper to proceed from cart to checkout.

criteria.must: A 'proceed to checkout' action from the cart navigates the shopper into the checkout flow

requirements.statement: The system shall collect shipping information (name, address, contact details) during checkout.

criteria.must: The checkout flow requires and captures a shipping name, address, and contact details

requirements.statement: The system shall allow the shopper to select a shipping method, displaying associated cost and estimated delivery time, if applicable.

criteria.must: The checkout flow offers a shipping method selection showing its cost

requirements.statement: The system shall collect payment information and process payment securely during checkout.

criteria.must: The checkout flow collects payment information from the shopper
Payment information is transmitted only over an encrypted connection

requirements.statement: The system shall display an order summary for the shopper to review before confirming the order.

criteria.must: Before confirming, the shopper sees an order summary with items, quantities, prices, shipping, taxes, and total

requirements.statement: The system shall create an order record upon successful payment and shall not create an order if payment fails.

criteria.must: A successful payment results in an order record being created
A failed payment results in no order record being created

requirements.statement: The system shall display an order confirmation to the shopper after a successful checkout, including an order number/reference.

criteria.must: After successful checkout, the shopper sees an order confirmation screen showing an order number

requirements.statement: The system shall send an order confirmation notification (e.g., email) to the shopper after a successful checkout.

criteria.must: After a successful checkout, an order confirmation email is sent to the shopper

requirements.statement: The system shall decrement product stock levels upon successful order placement.

criteria.must: After an order is placed successfully, the ordered product's stock quantity is decremented by the ordered amount

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a guest shopper to check out without creating an account.

criteria.must: A shopper can complete checkout and receive an order confirmation without registering an account

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a shopper to register for an account using an email address and password (or supported identity provider).

criteria.must: A new shopper can complete a registration flow to create an account

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a registered customer to log in and log out.

criteria.must: A registered customer can log in with their credentials
A logged-in customer can log out, ending their authenticated session

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a registered customer to view their past orders and order status.

criteria.must: A registered customer can view a list of their past orders
Each past order shown displays its current status

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a registered customer to view and update their saved shipping addresses and contact information.

criteria.must: A registered customer can view their saved shipping addresses
A registered customer can update a saved shipping address or contact information

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a store administrator to create, update, and remove (or deactivate) products in the catalog.

criteria.must: An administrator can create a new product in the catalog
An administrator can update an existing product's details
An administrator can remove or deactivate a product

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a store administrator to update product stock levels.

criteria.must: An administrator can update a product's stock level and the change is reflected in the catalog

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a store administrator to view a list of orders and the details of an individual order.

criteria.must: An administrator can view a list of all orders
An administrator can view the details of an individual order

requirements.statement: The system shall allow a store administrator to update the status of an order.

criteria.must: An administrator can change an order's status (e.g. to shipped, delivered, or cancelled) and the new status is reflected on the order

requirements.statement: The system shall restrict catalog and order management functions to authenticated users with the administrator role.

criteria.must: A non-administrator (or unauthenticated) user cannot access catalog management functions
A non-administrator (or unauthenticated) user cannot access order management functions

requirements.statement: The storefront shall be usable on both desktop and mobile-sized browser viewports.

criteria.must: Core storefront flows (browse, cart, checkout) render usably at both desktop and mobile viewport widths

requirements.statement: Catalog listing and product detail pages shall load within 2 seconds under normal load conditions.

criteria.must: A catalog listing page loads within 2 seconds under normal load
A product detail page loads within 2 seconds under normal load

requirements.statement: All payment and personal information shall be transmitted over encrypted connections, and passwords shall never be stored in plain text.

criteria.must: The storefront is served exclusively over HTTPS/TLS
Stored passwords are never in plain text

requirements.statement: Only authenticated administrators shall be able to access catalog and order management functions.

criteria.must: Catalog and order management functions require administrator authentication to access

requirements.statement: Order and payment processing shall be consistent: a customer is never charged without a corresponding order, and never has an order without a corresponding successful payment.

criteria.must: Every successful payment corresponds to exactly one created order
No order exists without a corresponding successful payment

requirements.statement: The storefront shall be available to shoppers during standard e-commerce traffic conditions, including brief periods of elevated load.

criteria.must: The storefront remains available and responsive during a brief period of elevated traffic

requirements.statement: Stock levels shall remain accurate and consistent even when multiple shoppers attempt to purchase the same limited-stock item concurrently.

criteria.must: When two shoppers concurrently attempt to purchase the last unit(s) of a limited-stock item, stock never goes negative and only the available quantity is sold

requirements.statement: Core storefront flows shall follow basic web accessibility practices.

criteria.must: Core storefront flows (browse, cart, checkout) use semantic HTML, sufficient color contrast, and are keyboard-navigable
